name: Naman Agrawal
feedback: Dr. Lokesh Daswani is an exceptional dentist. I got my implants done here, and the treatment was absolutely painless. The clinic has high-end equipment and MDS specialists.

name: Pooja Sharma
feedback: Best dental clinic in Nagpur. Dr. Shraddha and her team are highly professional and gentle. They explained the Invisalign alignment procedure so clearly. Very happy with my results!

name: Rajesh Kumar
feedback: Highly recommend Das Dental Clinic. Dr. Badal Daswani is a Gold Medalist orthodontist, and it shows in his expertise. The staff is polite, and they maintain strict hygiene standards.

name: Sneha Deshmukh
feedback: I had a root canal treatment (R.C.T.) here by their specialist endodontist. I was very nervous, but they made sure I felt absolutely no pain. Porcelain crown matches my teeth perfectly.
